=== bd1990-08-29_falcon-heights_info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Minnesota State Fair, 
Falcon Heights, Minnesota, 29/08/90

CD I:
Marine Hymn (trad.) (instrumental)
Silvio (Bob Dylan/Robert Hunter (with harp)
Masters Of War
Lay Lady Lay (with harp)
Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again
Gotta Serve Somebody
@ Ballad Of Hollis Brown
@ The Times They Are A-Changin' (with harp)
@ Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (with harp)
@ Song To Woody (with harp)	

CD II:
Rainy Day Women #12 & 35
Friend Of The Devil (Jerry Garcia/Robert Hunter/John Dawson)
Joey (Bob Dylan/Jacques Levy)
All Along The Watchtower
Simple Twist Of Fate (with harp)
Like A Rolling Stone (with harp)
@ Blowin' In The Wind (with harp)
Highway 61 Revisited (G. E. Smith on electric slide guitar)

Concert # 223 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 13 of the 1990 Late Summer Tour Of North America. 1990 concert # 53.Concert # 145 with the second G. E. Smith band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), G. E. Smith (guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), Christopher Parker (drums). Steve Bruton is tried out as guitar-player, this one of Dylan's many "live-on-stage-auditions" that autumn...

I got these cd-rs from a trade back in the pre-torrent days. It has the same disc-split as LB-4787. I can't hear the tv-band on d1t3 described in that, I may not be good at hearing it, please check those who might now. I would rate this sound-quality slightly higher than that B-. Ripped with EAC (secure mode) and straight to FLAC
